_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalization and characterization of Schwann cell lines derived from NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Panel A shows cropped results from the same blot hybridized for neurofibromin (NF1, 250 kD) and subsequently beta actin (42 kD)
details: Successfully detected beta actin at 42 kD in Western blot analysis, used for normalization of neurofibromin abundance
